stemHtml: What statement below is correct regarding the difference between an RNAV STAR and an RNAV STAR overlay?

options.a: An RNAV STAR overlay will have a shorter route distance than an RNAV STAR as it has less constraints.
options.b: An RNAV STAR overlay will follow the same route as a STAR that is defined by ground based navigation aids.
options.c: An RNAV STAR overlay CANNOT follow the same route as a STAR that is defined by ground based navigation aids.
options.d: An RNAV STAR overlay will have a longer route distance than an RNAV STAR as it has less constraints.
